mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, description, content, html_content, tags, category, is_system AS system_flag, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM note_template WHERE is_system = 1 OR user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_system DESC, update_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM note_template WHERE id = #{id} AND (is_system = 1 OR user_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1
